US public sector transitioning to public cloud, ISG reports. Boom in multi-cloud platforms adoption.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, the U.S. public sector is rapidly embracing public cloud services according to ISG. The transition involves shifting from outdated legacy systems to modern multi-cloud platforms. This move signifies a significant shift in the sector's IT infrastructure, with a substantial increase in the adoption of advanced cloud technologies.

news.headline: AI in Video Surveillance Market to reach $12.46B by 2030, growing at 21.3% CAGR from 2025 - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of December 20, 2024, the market for AI in video surveillance is predicted to expand significantly. Starting at a value of USD 3.90 billion in 2024, this market is forecasted to reach USD 12.46 billion by the year 2030, reflecting a consistent annual growth rate of 21.3% from 2025 to 2030. This data originates from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™. The surge in demand for...

news.headline: Green Hydrogen Systems A/S reduces share capital and secures a DKK 80 million short-term loan.
Inflation data missed expectations, easing market volatility. PCE rose 2.4% YoY, core PCE at 2.8%. Traders cautious despite softer numbers. Fed remains restrictive.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve's preferred inflation gauge, the Personal Consumption Expenditures price index, rose 2.4% year-over-year in November, below the 2.5% forecast. The monthly growth rate slowed to 0.1%, down from 0.2% in October. The core PCE, excluding food and energy, stood at 2.8% annually, slightly under the 2.9% estimate, with the monthly core rate also dropping to 0.1% from 0.3%. Despite lower inflation figures, traders remained cautious after this week's market volatility. New York Fed President John Williams described the recent inflation data as encouraging news, emphasizing further disinflation progress. Investors are still assessing the Fed's hawkish stance cautiously.

news.headline: CoVar has received a multi-year contract with DARPA to set ethical standards for future autonomous systems.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, on December 20, 2024, CoVar, a prominent developer of AI and machine learning solutions for the Department of Defense, secured a multi-year contract with the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA). The contract aims to bolster the Autonomy Standards and Ideals program.

news.headline: United Direct Solutions in Louisville, KY, focuses on trust and personalization in financial services communications as 2025 nears.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky on December 20, 2024, United Direct Solutions (UDS) - a direct marketing firm focusing on enhancing connections between businesses and audiences - acknowledges the increasing importance of trust and personalization as the new year looms.

news.headline: The S&P 500 index has erased all post-Election Day gains in live coverage.
Paul and LeighAnn Gravette donate to Broadway Hearts, a nonprofit inspiring ill children.
news.summary: A donation from Palm Beach residents Paul and LeighAnn Gravette has been received by Broadway Hearts, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit in New York. The organization aims to inspire children facing serious illnesses by bringing the transformative magic of Broadway to their lives. This generous contribution is set to further support their mission in making a positive impact on the brave children, aiding in their battles.

news.headline: ROMCO Equipment Co. and SMT acquire Bee Equipment Sales in Texas to bolster industry presence, reported on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: Strategic acquisition in Texas is driving expansion for ROMCO Equipment Co. and SMT. The move, announced on Dec. 20, 2024 in Dallas, signifies a significant step to solidify their position in the construction and paving equipment sector in Texas. The acquisition of Bee Equipment Sales is part of this strategic initiative. This acquisition is set to boost their market presence and enhance their competitive edge.

news.headline: World Whiskey Society introduces 20-Year-Old Family Reserve Whiskey in honor of AIKO Brands Founder Igor Kogan and 20th anniversary. Limited edition.
news.summary: The World Whiskey Society has released a special edition whiskey in honor of Igor Kogan, the founder of AIKO Brands, and the 20th anniversary of the company. The limited edition whiskey is a tribute to this milestone and is a part of WWS's dedication to creating unique spirits. The release comes in December 2024 and showcases the commitment to quality and celebration of achievements in the industry. This special whiskey is a representation of the partnership between WWS and AIKO Brands, commemorating the occasion with a product that marks this significant event in the spirits world.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price hits 1-month low at $92,805, last below $91,000 on Nov. 26. Analysts speculate on potential recovery. Trader predicts relative bottom soon but warns of further downside before reversal. V-shaped recovery unlikely.
news.summary: Bitcoin has dropped to a new low of $92,805, marking its lowest price since November 26th when it last went below $91,000. Speculation is rife among cryptocurrency traders and analysts regarding whether Bitcoin has hit its bottom at this level or if further decline is expected. Renowned trader Altcoin Sherpa forecasts that Bitcoin will soon hit a relative bottom, but warns of potential further downside before any chance of a reversal. In a recent post, he advised followers to prepare for the next downward movement and keep an eye on shorter time frames, indicating that a rapid V-shaped recovery is improbable. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Brooklyn AI parent company secures strategic funding from Atypical Ventures, S&P Global, and assets & wealth execs.
news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York on December 20, 2024, Brooklyn Artificial Intelligence Research (Brooklyn) disclosed the completion of a significant funding round. Atypical Ventures spearheaded this round, with support from S&P Global Ventures, the CEO of the Hantz Group, and asset and wealth management entities.

news.headline: Pulte Family Office sends letter to Virtu Board, offers up to $100M to take private by Apollo.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Boca Raton, Florida, The Pulte Family Office, an activist shareholder in Virtu Financial and the founding family of PulteGroup, one of the biggest homebuilders in the country, released a statement. They had privately and publicly urged for changes in Virtu Financial's operations, emphasizing the need for increased transparency and better governance. The Pulte Family Office emphasized their dedication to ensuring the best interests of shareholders and the company, highlighting their substantial ownership stake in Virtu Financial.

news.headline: Fed's core PCE price index rises tepidly in November after couple of high readings, S&P 500 reduces losses.
news.summary: In November, the core PCE price index, a key measure of inflation for the Federal Reserve, saw a modest increase following previous high readings. Concurrently, the S&P 500 managed to decrease its losses during this period.

news.headline: ResearchAndMarkets.com adds ICICI Bank Limited's company profile to its offerings. Details ICICI Bank's digital transformation strategies, innovation programs, and technology initiatives. Private sector bank offering various financial products.
news.summary: A report on ICICI Bank Limited for 2024 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's Enterprise Tech Ecosystem Series. The profile delves into ICICI Bank's technological endeavors, encompassing digital transformation strategies, innovation initiatives, and technology projects. ICICI Bank Limited, a private sector bank, offers a range of financial products and focuses on commercial banking operations. This resource highlights the bank's tech landscape, shedding light on its advancements in the industry.

news.headline: Medical director in Greater New York advises against delaying cancer treatment during holidays, emphasizing harmful effects.
news.summary: A well-known physician in the Greater New York area has warned against pausing cancer treatment during the holiday season, emphasizing the potential harm even short delays can cause. The physician, based in Somerset, N.J., underscored the importance of continuing treatment without interruptions. It was emphasized that maintaining care during the holidays can help minimize the impact on one's enjoyment of the festive season. The advice comes amid understandable temptations to halt treatment during this time.

news.headline: The AI in oncology market set to reach US$11.52 billion by 2030 at 29.4% CAGR, starting from US$1.92 billion in 2023.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida on December 20, 2024, it was reported that the worldwide market for AI in oncology was worth US$1.92 billion in 2023. Experts predict a substantial growth with a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 29.4%, expecting the market to reach US$2.45 billion in 2024 and a remarkable US$11.52 billion by 2030. This significant escalation is linked to the rising demand for AI technology in cancer treatment and research.

news.headline: CCM Hockey and USA Hockey partner; CCM to supply all national teams. Deal finalized on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent development on December 20, 2024, CCM Hockey has forged a significant partnership with USA Hockey National Teams, stepping in as the official supplier. This collaboration marks a notable milestone as CCM Hockey is set to serve as the exclusive partner and provider for all national teams under USA Hockey. This partnership is expected to bring about enhanced support and resources to the national teams, further boosting their performance on the global stage.

news.headline: Ethereum's price drops 8.04% in 24 hours to $3,327.93, a 17.0% decrease from the past week's $3,948.91.
news.summary: The price of Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) has dropped by 8.04% in the last 24 hours, now standing at $3,327.93. This decline continues the downward trend observed over the past week, amounting to -17.0% from $3,948.91. The chart illustrates the price movement and volatility of Ethereum in the past day. More information can be found on the full story at Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Solana's price drops 8.21% to $188.13 in 24 hours; down 16.0% in past week from $224.06.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) has dropped by 8.21% to $188.13, maintaining a downward trajectory seen over the past week with a total loss of 16.0% from $224.06. This represents a significant decrease in value. The chart illustrating Solana's price movement and volatility can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Reunion helped sell $870M in Section 45X Tax Credits for First Solar on December 6, 2024.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Reunion, a prominent platform for clean energy tax credit transfers, successfully facilitated two transactions for a third party to acquire up to $870 million in advanced manufacturing production tax credits. This accomplishment signifies Reunion's commitment to fostering investments in clean energy initiatives and promoting sustainable practices.

news.headline: Latin GRAMMY Cultural Foundation announces 2025 Warner Latina Scholarship in Miami; extra aid for students in need.
news.summary: The Latin GRAMMY Cultural Foundation has revealed the 2025 Warner Latina Scholarship in Miami. This scholarship aims to provide financial assistance to students pursuing music-related studies. In addition, students facing financial constraints can avail of extra aid. This initiative underscores the foundation's commitment to supporting education in the Latin music industry.

news.headline: Quatrro Business Support Services chosen for Newsweek's Excellence 1000 Index for tech-enabled outsourcing services.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Atlanta, Quatrro Business Support Services (Quatrro), a prominent company in outsourced finance and accounting, human resources, application development, and IT support services for SMBs and the mid-market, made a significant announcement.

news.headline: CapStorm releases Salesforce Connector for seamless data integration with Snowflake, a Snowflake Native Application.
news.summary: In the town of Santa Rosa Beach, Florida, a prominent company called CapStorm, known for their expertise in Salesforce data management, has recently introduced their newest product, the CapStorm Salesforce Connector. Launched on December 20, 2024, this innovative solution is designed as a Snowflake Native Application, aiming to seamlessly integrate various functionalities.

news.headline: STARFIRE Premium Lubricants begins construction on 104,000-square-foot facility in Hamilton, Ohio, showing commitment to growth.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Ohio, on December 20, 2024, STARFIRE Premium Lubricants has officially started construction on a new facility spanning 104,000 square feet. This development signifies a major advancement in STARFIRE's expansion strategy and dedication to offering top-notch lubricants.

news.headline: Renowned clinician-scientist Dr. Anne S. Renteria appointed to lead Perlmutter Cancer Center's Transplantation & Cellular Therapy Center on Long Island.
news.summary: In Mineola, New York, on December 20, 2024, the Perlmutter Cancer Center at NYU Langone Hospital—Long Island appointed Dr. Anne S. Renteria as the site director of its Transplantation and Cellular Therapy Center—Long Island. Dr. Renteria, who previously worked at MedStar Georgetown, will now lead the center in its efforts to further advance cancer treatment.

Dominican Republic attracts significant investments, with recent deals including a $4.2 billion transaction by medical tech giants.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Santo Domingo, the Dominican Republic further establishes itself as a key hub for foreign investment, boasting skilled workforce, favorable business environment, and proximity to the US. With tax benefits and modern free trade zones, the country has attracted significant multinational corporations. Notably, top companies like Edwards Lifesciences and Becton Dickinson sealed a deal worth US$4.2 billion. Additionally, Ecolab sold its surgical solutions unit to Medline for around US$950 million, encompassing major operations in the Dominican Republic. This showcases the nation's appeal to global companies seeking growth opportunities.

news.headline: Counsel Press buys Case Anywhere to expand into trial courts, with the acquisition completed on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Counsel Press Inc., a legal services platform owned by Align Capital Partners, has expanded its offerings by acquiring Case Anywhere LLC. This acquisition allows Counsel Press to provide trial court services, further enhancing its services. Case Anywhere, a cloud-based company, will now be a part of Counsel Press, which is set to increase its reach and capabilities in the legal services industry.

news.headline: Greenway Health introduces UDS+ reporting for FQHCs to comply with HRSA requirements. TAMPA, Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: Greenway Health, a prominent health information technology services provider based in Tampa, Florida, disclosed on December 20, 2024, the launch of its UDS+ reporting feature. This system aims to assist Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs) in aligning with the changing requirements set by the Health Resources and Services Administration (HRSA). This new offering focuses on simplifying regulatory compliance for healthcare organizations.

news.headline: Giift (Empuls) mentioned in 2024 Gartner Market Guide for Voice of the Employee Solutions, 2nd year in a row.
news.summary: In a press release on December 20, 2024, Giift (Empuls) (previously Xoxoday) was acknowledged for the second year in a row in the 2024 Gartner Market Guide for Voice of the Employee (VoE) Solutions. This recognition underscores the platform's increasing global impact, showcasing its continued prominence in the industry.

news.headline: FDA approves Symvess, first acellular vessel for extremity arterial injury. Dec. 20, 2024. Key: Symvess, FDA approval.
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Maryland, on December 20, 2024, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval for Symvess. This marks the first time an acellular tissue engineered vessel has been authorized for adult use as a vascular conduit to address extremity arterial injuries requiring urgent revascularization. This milestone is significant for medical advancements and patient care.

news.headline: Hinckley appoints Gavin McClintock as new CEO, known for finance background and marina expertise. Excels in craftsmanship and service.
news.summary: In Portsmouth, Rhode Island, Hinckley has named Gavin McClintock as its new CEO. Formerly the CFO of Safe Harbor Marinas and founder of Tidekeeper marina group, McClintock brings significant industry experience to the role. Hinckley, renowned for exceptional craftsmanship and a strong service network along the Eastern Seaboard, looks forward to leveraging McClintock's leadership. This appointment signals a strategic move towards enhancing the company's offerings and expanding its presence in the marine industry.

TCL Zhonghuan receives ESG rating upgrade from MSCI to BBB, a jump from BB. Dec. 16 report.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on December 20, 2024, the renowned financial services firm Morgan Stanley Capital International (MSCI) raised TCL Zhonghuan's ESG rating from "BB" to "BBB" in its recent report dated December 16th. This upgrade signifies a positive recognition of TCL Zhonghuan's Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) performance.
